description: Style Note Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!   Product Details Case style: White plastic round case with a rotating bezel Dial style: White dial with white and silver hands Strap style: White plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistance to 5 BAR, allowing you to wear it even when showering Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 31 mm Case thickness: 8 mm
